views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's affirmation count vs goal, current streak flame, mood ring, favorite affirmation spotlight, and category diversity wheel

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal to write a new affirmation, select category and practice time, rate post-practice mood, toggle spoken-aloud, and optionally add a brief reflection

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Chronological list of all affirmations grouped by date, with search, category filter, and favorites-only toggle; each row shows the affirmation text, category badge, mood indicator, and favorite star

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Deep insights: mood trend line chart over weeks, category distribution pie chart, practice time heatmap (morning vs evening patterns), spoken-aloud rate, streak history bar chart, and AI-generated insight cards

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily goal completed (todayCount / dailyGoal), capped at 1.0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one affirmation logged, counting back from today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Difference between this week's average mood and last week's average mood; positive means improving

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyCountData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily affirmation counts for the last 7 days, used for bar chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total entries per category across all time, sorted descending for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryDiversityScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Shannon entropy of category usage normalized to 0–1; higher means more balanced practice across all categories

viewModelComputedProperties.name: spokenAloudRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of entries where spokenAloud is true, as research shows speaking affirmations aloud increases effectiveness

viewModelComputedProperties.name: practiceTimeBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of entries by practice time for time-of-day pattern analysis

viewModelComputedProperties.name: favoriteAffirmations
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries marked as favorite, sorted by most recent, for spotlight card and quick reference

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily average mood ratings for the last 30 days for line chart trend visualization

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of dynamically generated insight strings based on current data: streak milestones, mood trends, category suggestions, practice time patterns, spoken-aloud encouragement

dailyGoal.description: Target number of affirmations to practice per day. Recommended minimum is 3 for habit formation — one morning intention, one midday boost, one evening reflection.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least 1 affirmation entry is logged. The streak increments for each consecutive calendar day with activity. Missing a single day resets to 0. Today counts toward the streak if it has entries; otherwise the streak is counted up to yesterday.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary trend: 7-day rolling average mood compared to previous 7-day window, expressed as percentage change. Secondary trend: weekly practice frequency (entries per week) compared to prior week. Tertiary: category diversity score trend — is the user exploring more categories or narrowing?
insights: Streak milestone celebrations at 3, 7, 14, 30, 60, 100 days with contextual encouragement
Mood correlation: when average mood is higher on days with 3+ affirmations vs fewer, surface 'Practicing 3+ affirmations correlates with X% higher mood'
Category suggestion: if categoryDiversityScore < 0.5, suggest least-used categories — 'You haven't explored Health affirmations in 2 weeks'
Practice time pattern: identify preferred time and suggest consistency — 'You feel best when practicing in the morning (avg mood 4.2 vs 3.5 evening)'
Spoken aloud encouragement: if spokenAloudRate < 0.3, surface 'Speaking affirmations aloud can increase their effectiveness — try it tomorrow morning'
Favorite density: if user hasn't favorited in 2+ weeks, prompt 'Star the affirmations that resonate most — revisiting favorites reinforces belief'
Weekly summary: 'This week you practiced X affirmations across Y categories — your mood trend is [up/down/stable]'
